def positive_function_returns_domain_value_and_transport_metadata():
    rule_id = "function_returns_domain_value_and_transport_metadata"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag APIs that mix domain results with transport metadata such as status-like fields or side-channel details in one return shape."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
